title: PLC Program Backup & Restore – Siemens S7-1200
description: Customer reports PLC lost program after power surge. Need to restore from backup and validate I/O signals. Site visit required.

title: ABB VFD Fault – Overcurrent Trip at Startup
description: ACS880 11kW drive trips on overcurrent at every startup attempt. Motor checked OK. Possibly drive parameter or hardware issue.

title: Safety Scanner Alignment – SICK S300
description: After conveyor relayout, safety scanner field needs remapping and recommissioning. OSSD outputs not enabling correctly.

title: MCCB Annual Maintenance – MCC Panel
description: Annual preventive maintenance of Schneider Masterpact NW 800A units. Contact inspection, thermal imaging, trip test.

title: Power Quality Analysis & Harmonic Audit
description: Customer experiencing voltage fluctuation and motor heating. Need to deploy Fluke 435-II for 48hr logging and harmonic analysis report.

title: Encoder Replacement – Servo Axis 3
description: Encoder on axis 3 of robotic welding cell giving intermittent position errors. Replacement and recalibration needed.
